name_en: In stock 24c WOC handle. Simply too exquisite 〰️ Open the inner pocket, there is a large metal logo plate inside. Chanel's attention to detail is impeccable ✔️ Upon receiving the actual item, you will definitely be amazed ✨ Dimensions: 19*12*3.5*cm
